allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''Description:'''', d.get\(''''description'''',''''''''\)\); print\(''''Language:'''', d.get\(''''language'''',''''''''\)\); print\(''''Stars:'''', d.get\(''''stargazers_count'''',0\)\); print\(''''Topics:'''', d.get\(''''topics'''',[]\)\); print\(''''Default branch:'''', d.get\(''''default_branch'''',''''''''\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; files=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f[''''name''''], f[''''type'''']\) for f in files]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; files=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f[''''name'''']\) for f in files]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(i[''''path'''']\) for i in json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\)[''''tree''''] if i[''''path''''].startswith\(''''src/''''\)]")
